description: Display multiple product variations or flavor options within a single offering, inviting audience to select their personal preference through interactive choice framing.
structural_recipe: Feature a product family or flavor lineup visually (e.g., different coffee shots, beverage variants). Use captions that: (1) name the product family, (2) highlight mood/taste variety, (3) invite personal selection with casual language (اختار المفضل عندك), (4) include brand hashtags and cultural relevance markers. Structure as carousel or grid showing distinct variations side-by-side.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to personalization and autonomy in consumption choices. Presenting variety signals abundance and caters to diverse preferences within social groups. The casual invitation to choose (اختار) creates agency and relatability, driving both engagement and sharing potential within peer networks.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure product variations are meaningfully distinct (flavor, strength, size) rather than superficial
Localize preference language to regional tastes and mood associations
Avoid overwhelming choice—3-5 clear options perform better than extensive lineups
Verify all variants are available in target markets before promotional push
